release_notes:
# Alpha 5.2.0 - 2026-05-18 - Industrial-strength SAP header normalisation.

- drops Cc / Cs / Co / Cn / Zl / Zp categories
- drops Cf word-joiners (ZWJ U+200D, ZWNJ U+200C, SHY U+00AD)
- BUT promotes Cf soft separators (ZWSP U+200B, BOM U+FEFF)
- tab character treated as space
- every Zs (ASCII space, NBSP, EM-space, ideographic, ...)
- runs collapsed; outer stripped
- 56 parametrised cases covering every Unicode noise pattern
- col-map indexability via cleaned literal
- End-to-end PL file smoke
